name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.14: GYM-MEM playable. WARDEN SOMA on the slow/endurance/status track — 4 KEEPER trainers (STACK/PAGE/LEDGER/VAULT) on MEM-type creatures (STACKAT/PAGYL/CACHEY/MALLOCK), leader team HEAPYR/ALLOCROC/NULLPUP, LEAK + BLOAT + NULL-DEREF status flavor, second badge bit (MEM=2). Carries forward v0.13's catch loop (cc-dex-sync.py writes cinder.creature.caught + cinder.dex.milestone rows into cinder.db so tomorrow's encounter-pool tier rises), v0.12's GYM-LOGIC scene, v0.11's USB-driven encounter pool, 56 cinderized creature sprites, 16 script events, playable starter scenes, 5 sound FX, 5-type chart, 5 named gym leaders (ARCHIVIST EOS / WARDEN SOMA / CONDUCTOR TEMPO / COURIER HERMES / FOREMAN ATLAS).
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
